strengths: 20 years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — well above the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq demonstrates emerging practical AI fluency
Founder/open-source platform builder (GISCollective) with public speaking history shows entrepreneurial instincts and willingness to share knowledge externally
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field; both degrees are undergraduate-level and neither is AI-focused
AI experience is very recent (April 2025 onward) and at a tooling/implementation level — no evidence of recognized AI expertise, published research, or strategic AI product leadership
Career history is that of a senior/staff individual contributor, with no demonstrated director-level technical leadership, cross-org strategy work, or C-suite/customer advisory engagement

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: James Smith is a highly versatile and experienced software engineer whose breadth of skills and recent foray into agentic AI tooling show genuine technical curiosity, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor who is already a recognized authority in AI strategy — capable of advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product futures, and inspiring internal and external audiences. The candidate's AI exposure is too recent and too implementation-focused to meet that bar, and his career arc, while solid, has not included the kind of organizational influence, strategic advisory work, or large-scale AI platform ownership the position requires.
